    "Personnel riding in the bucket of heavy earthmoving equipment",
    "Severe fall and crushing hazard"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately order a stop to the unsafe work practice",
    "Instruct the operator to lower the bucket to the ground and have the rider step off",

  "rationale": "Riding in the bucket of an excavator, loader, or similar earthmoving equipment is a severe safety violation that is strictly prohibited. Equipment buckets are not designed or approved for lifting or transporting personnel.",
